title: Kaattu Kuyilu Lyrics Thalapathi
stanzas:
poda ellam vittu thallu
palasa ellaam sutthu thallu
pudhusa ippo porandhomnu
ennikollada doi..

payanam enae ponaalenna
padhai nooru aanaalenna
thottam vachavan
thanneer viduvaan
summa nilladaa doi

oodhak kathu veesa
udambukkule koosa
kuppa kuzham patha vachi
kaayalaam

achu vellam pacharisi
vetti vacha sengarumbu
athanayum thitthikura
naal thaan.

bandham enna sondham enna
ponaa enna vandhaa enna
uravukellaam kavala
patta jenmam naanille..

paasam vaikka nesam vaika
thozhan undu vazha vaikka
avanai thavira uravukkaaran
yaarum ingille.

ullamattum naane
usura koodathaane
en nanban kaetta
vaangikkanu solluven

en nanban potta
nidhamum thinnen paaru
natpai kooda
karpai pola
ennuven.

sogam vittu sorgam thottu
raagam ittu thazham ittu
paattu paadum vaanampaadi
naamthaan.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaattu Kuyilu?

The song celebrates joy and the carefree spirit of life.

Who composed the music for Thalapathi?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

Who are the singers of Kaattu Kuyilu?

The song is sung by KJ Yesudas and SP Balasubrahmanyam.

What is the release year of the movie Thalapathi?

The movie was released in 1991.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes feelings of happiness and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kaattu Kuyilu is a lively and energetic song from the movie Thalapathi, composed by Ilaiyaraaja. Sung by the legendary duo KJ Yesudas and SP Balasubrahmanyam, the song captures the essence of joy and celebration. The lyrics by Vaali convey a sense of carefree happiness and the beauty of life. This classic track remains a favorite for its vibrant melody and timeless appeal.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Kaattu Kuyilu from the iconic movie Thalapathi. This classic track features the legendary voices of KJ Yesudas and SP Balasubrahmanyam, set to the masterful composition of Ilaiyaraaja. Dive into a world of joy and rhythm with lyrics penned by Vaali.
stanzaMeanings: The wild cuckoo in my heart never lacks a song to sing.
Tap the drum, jump around, leave worries, and dance happily.
In the gathering of everyone, in moments of happiness, even in tough times, there's joy in the heart.
The wild cuckoo in my heart never lacks a song to sing.
Tap the drum, jump around, leave worries, and dance happily.
Let go of everything, push away the old, think of it as a new beginning.
If the journey is long, or if there are many paths, the one who planted the garden will water it, so just stay calm.
When the wind blows, the body feels shy, but it can handle the mess and heal.
The day a mother gives birth is a good day.
Like milk and water flowing together.
The day when sugarcane and rice are cut and everything tastes sweet.
The wild cuckoo in my heart never lacks a song to sing.
Tap the drum, jump around, leave worries, and dance happily.
In the gathering of everyone, in moments of happiness, even in tough times, there's joy in the heart.
The wild cuckoo in my heart never lacks a song to sing.
Tap the drum, jump around, leave worries, and dance happily.
What is a bond, what is a relationship, what if they come or go, I am not someone who worries about these ties.
There is a friend to share love and affection, apart from him, there is no one else here for relationships.
I am the only one with a heart, I will tell my friend to ask for life.
I always ate what my friend gave, I consider friendship as pure as learning.
Leaving sadness, touching happiness, adding music and fragrance, we sing like the sky.
The wild cuckoo in my heart never lacks a song to sing.
Tap the drum, jump around, leave worries, and dance happily.
In the gathering of everyone, in moments of happiness, even in tough times, there's joy in the heart.
The wild cuckoo in my heart never lacks a song to sing.
Tap the drum, jump around, leave worries, and dance happily.
